atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right foot pain following a fall.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in his right foot following a fall while yard working yesterday.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previously injured his ankle twenty years ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional soreness and swelling related to his previous ankle injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports soreness in his other ankle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports surgery on his other ankle.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional instability related to his surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the incident to a few names.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has not taken any medications for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals bruising to the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals associated swelling to the right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation at the midfoot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is brisk in less than three seconds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong and bounding.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a Lisfranc fracture

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The Lisfranc fracture involves the second metatarsal bone and the top of the foot

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An MRI will be ordered

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An outpatient surgery is planned for tomorrow

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will be discharged that evening

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment will be scheduled in 24 hours post-procedure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment will be scheduled in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will receive a cast

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will receive crutches

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will have weight-bearing restrictions for six to eight weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient will advance ambulation gradually based on healing and tolerance

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The surgeon will use plates and screws to align the bones and ligaments
